title: Recurrence
summary: States the neighboring-index recurrence equations required for OR defect cancellation.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: States the neighboring-index recurrence equations required for OR defect cancellation.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows PolyGJMSoperators/OR/Coefficients/Recurrence.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A rational coefficient system on the OR support of total degree N. Its mathematical data are: coeff: ORIndex N maps to ℚ.

Coefficients cast to real numbers for ambient operators. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, c of type orcoefficient system n, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is C.coeff I.
correspondence.leanType: def coeffR {N : ℕ} (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (I : ORIndex N) : ℝ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, C of type ORCoefficient System N, and I of type ORIndex N, C.coeff R I equals C.coeff I.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;C\colon \operatorname{ORCoefficientSystem} N,\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\quad C.\operatorname{coeffR} I = C.\operatorname{coeff} I
correspondence.leanType: theorem coeffR_apply {N : ℕ} (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (I : ORIndex N) : C.coeffR I = (C.coeff I : ℝ)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Rational defect cancellation for an OR coefficient system. defectCoeffQ I slot k is the rational coefficient of the obstruction k created by the word indexed by I in the input slot slot. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, κ a type, k a finite set, c of type orcoefficient system n, and defectcoeffq of type orindex n maps to fin 2 maps to κ maps to ℚ, its defining expression is for every slot : Fin 2 k : κ, k belongs to K maps to ∑ I belongs to ORIndex.support N, C.coeff I times defect Coeff Q I slot k equals 0.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ}(K,C,defectCoeffQ)=\forall (\operatorname{slot} \colon \operatorname{Fin} 2) (k \colon κ), k \in K \longrightarrow \sum I \in \operatorname{ORIndex}.\operatorname{support} N, C.\operatorname{coeff} I \cdot \operatorname{defectCoeffQ} I \operatorname{slot} k = 0
correspondence.leanType: def SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (K : Finset κ) (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The OR recurrence, recorded in the cancellation form used by the operator proof. The parameters w₁, w₂, and n are kept here so the later paper-specific recurrence can specialize this predicate without changing the downstream API. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, κ a type, w₁, w₂, n of type ℚ, k a finite set, c of type orcoefficient system n, and defectcoeffq of type orindex n maps to fin 2 maps to κ maps to ℚ, its defining expression is Satisfies Defect Cancellation Q K C defect Coeff Q.
correspondence.leanType: def SatisfiesORRecurrence {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (_w₁ _w₂ _n : ℚ) (K : Finset κ) (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, κ a type, w₁, w₂, n of type ℚ, K a finite set, C of type ORCoefficient System N, and defectCoeffQ of type ORIndex N maps to Fin 2 maps to κ maps to ℚ, Satisfies ORRecurrence w₁ w₂ n K C defect Coeff Q if and only if Satisfies Defect Cancellation Q K C defect Coeff Q.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;κ\colon \mathrm{Type} _,\;\operatorname{DecidableEq} κ,\;w₁,w₂,n\colon \mathbb{Q},\;K\colon \operatorname{Finset} κ,\;C\colon \operatorname{ORCoefficientSystem} N,\;defectCoeffQ\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N \longrightarrow \operatorname{Fin} 2 \longrightarrow κ \longrightarrow \mathbb{Q},\quad \operatorname{SatisfiesORRecurrence} w₁ w₂ n K C \operatorname{defectCoeffQ} \Longleftrightarrow \operatorname{SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ} K C \operatorname{defectCoeffQ}
correspondence.leanType: theorem satisfiesORRecurrence_iff_defectCancellationQ {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (w₁ w₂ n : ℚ) (K : Finset κ) (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) : SatisfiesORRecurrence w₁ w₂ n K C defectCoeffQ ↔ SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ K C defectCoeffQ

Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
